overview: FunDoor is a kids' activity discovery app with city and state search, category tabs, activity cards with favorites, and user login with server-side favorites persistence.
features: Search kids' activities by city and state
Browse by category tabs: All, Theme Parks, Parks, Museums, Weekend Activities, Favorites
Activity cards with images, ratings, and website links
Heart/favorite toggle on each activity card
User registration and login with email and password
Server-side favorites that sync across devices
Guest favorites in localStorage that merge on login
